zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Poynings於1492年出生在英國素可波尼斯時，她的父親Edward Poynings33歲，母親Isabel Scott29歲。她於1510年5月4日與Thomas Clinton 8th Lord Clinton在英國英格蘭素可波尼斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1553年11月7日在她的家鄉享年61歲，埋葬在英國素可波尼斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Poynings于1492年出生在英国素可波尼斯时，她的父亲Edward Poynings33岁，母亲Isabel Scott29岁。她于1510年5月4日与Thomas Clinton 8th Lord Clinton在英国英格兰素可波尼斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1553年11月7日在她的家乡享年61岁，埋葬在英国素可波尼斯。

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Poynings was born in 1492, in Poynings, Sussex, England, her father, Edward Poynings, was 33 and her mother, Isabel Scott, was 29. She married Thomas Clinton 8th Lord Clinton on 4 May 1510, in Poynings, Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 7 November 1553, in her hometown, at the age of 61, and was buried in Poynings, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Poynings est née en 1492, à Poynings, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Edward Poynings, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Isabel Scott, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Clinton 8th Lord Clinton le 4 mai 1510, à Poynings, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 7 novembre 1553, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterrée à Poynings, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Poynings 1492 in Poynings, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edward Poynings 33 und ihre Mutter Isabel Scott 29. Sie hat am 4. Mai 1510 in Poynings, Sussex, England, United Kingdom Thomas Clinton 8th Lord Clinton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 7. November 1553 im Alter von 61 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Poynings, Sussex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Poynings è nata il nel 1492 nel Poynings, Sussex, England, sua padre, Edward Poynings, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Isabel Scott, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Clinton 8th Lord Clinton il 4 maggio 1510, nel Poynings, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 7 novembre 1553, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolta a Poynings, Sussex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Poyningsが1492年にイギリススセックスポイニングズで生まれた時，父Edward Poyningsは33歳，母Isabel Scottは29歳であった。1510年5月4日にイギリスイギリススセックスポイニングズでThomas Clinton 8th Lord Clintonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1553年11月7日に故郷で61歳で死去し，イギリススセックスポイニングズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Poynings(이)가 1492년 영국 수세스 포이닝스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edward Poynings(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Scott(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1510년 5월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 포이닝스에서 Thomas Clinton 8th Lord Clinton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1553년 11월 7일 그녀의 고향에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 포이닝스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Poynings nasceu em 1492, em Poynings, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edward Poynings, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Scott, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Clinton 8th Lord Clinton em 4 de maio de 1510, em Poynings, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 7 de novembro de 1553, em sua cidade natal, com 61 anos, e foi sepultada em Poynings, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Poynings родилась в 1492 г. в местности поинингс, суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Edward Poynings было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel Scott, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Clinton 8th Lord Clinton 4 мая 1510 г. в местности поинингс, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 7 ноября 1553 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 61 год и была похоронена в местности поинингс, суссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Poynings nació en 1492, en Poynings, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Edward Poynings, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Isabel Scott, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Thomas Clinton 8th Lord Clinton el 4 de mayo de 1510, en Poynings, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 7 de noviembre de 1553, en su pueblo, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultada en Poynings, Sussex, Inglaterra.
